[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000110101 4
1 101101010 5
2 110111010 6
3 101101110 6
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a
